title: Jmpa
compiled_truth: Jmpa is an external contact at [Dynegy](companies/dynegy). Over the corpus period (1999-10-04 to 2001-07-27), Jmpa sent 4 and received 265 emails, totalling 269 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (3), [Douglass](people/douglass-arterhadden) (3), [Bcherry](people/bcherry-sempra) (3), [Burkee](people/burkee-cts) (3), [Craigc](people/craigc-calpine) (3).
